# Unity Cursor Toolkit

> Unity Editor bridge for VS Code, Cursor, and MCP-capable AI agents.

Unity Cursor Toolkit provides hot reload, live console streaming, play mode controls, Mono debugger attach support, `.meta` resolution, and MCP tools for Unity Editor automation.

## Start Here

- Repository README: README.md
- AI agent guide: docs/AI_AGENTS.md
- MCP client setup: docs/MCP_CLIENTS.md
- Feature roadmap: docs/FEATURE_ROADMAP.md
- Extension README: unity-cursor-toolkit/README.md
- Unity package docs: Packages/com.rankupgames.unity-cursor-toolkit/Documentation~/README.md
- Zed setup: zed/README.md
- Agent coding instructions: AGENTS.md

## Important Commands

```bash
cd unity-cursor-toolkit
npm ci
npm run validate
npm run mcp:serve
```

## MCP Server

Build first with `npm run compile`, then run:

```bash
node unity-cursor-toolkit/out/mcp/server.js
```

Useful environment variables:

- `UNITY_CURSOR_TOOLKIT_MCP_READ_ONLY=1` blocks mutating Unity MCP tools.
- `UNITY_CURSOR_TOOLKIT_PROJECT_PATH=/path/to/unity/project` sets the project root for `.meta` resolution.
- `UNITY_CURSOR_TOOLKIT_MCP_PORTS=55500,55501,55502,55503,55504` overrides Unity TCP ports.

## Agent-Safe Tooling Notes

- Use `project_info`, `read_console`, `resolve_meta`, and `manage_scene` with `action: "getHierarchy"` before mutating.
- Use `dryRun: true` on mutating tools to inspect the normalized Unity command without executing it.
- Mutating tools include scene load/save/create, GameObject edits, component edits, asset edits, material edits, play mode, menu execution, build trigger, and batch execution.
